title: Bhoramdeo Temple
tagline: Bhoramdeo Temple — spiritual town of Chhattisgarh

overview.short: Bhoramdeo Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva in Bhoramdeo, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: Bhoramdeo Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva in Bhoramdeo, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It comprises a group of four temples of which the earliest is a brick-temple. The main temple is the Bhoramdeo temple built in stone. The architectural features with erotic sculptures has given a distinct style akin to the Khajuraho temple and the Konark Sun Temple in Odisha, and hence the Bhoramdeo complex is known by the sobriquet the "Khajuraho of Chhattisgarh".

topPlaces.name: Bhoramdev Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bhoramdev Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in Kabirdham district in the Indian State of Chhattisgarh. It is named after the Bhoramdeo Temple.

items.note: Bhoramdev Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in Kabirdham district in the Indian State of Chhattisgarh. It is named after the Bhoramdeo Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhoramdeo Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhoramdeo Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhoramdeo Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Bilaspur Junction (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhoramdeo Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhoramdeo Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhoramdeo Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhoramdeo Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhoramdeo Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhoramdev Wildlife Sanctuary.
